name: zkproof
description: Circom + snarkjs zk proof module for message-gated dApp integration

scripts.all: npm run compile && npm run setup && npm run gen-input && npm run witness && npm run prove && npm run verify
scripts.merkle:all: npm run merkle:compile && npm run merkle:setup && npm run merkle:gen-input && npm run merkle:witness && npm run merkle:prove && npm run merkle:verify
